steps.title: Use the photograph limitation
steps.content: The passage says a two-dimensional photograph cannot show how a building interacts with nearby sights and activities. The word "thus" asks for the consequence of that limitation: the image leaves out part of how the building's design works in context.

steps.title: Reject unsupported claims
steps.content: Choice A brings in people who have never visited Granada, which the passage does not discuss. Choice B shifts to deterioration of materials. Choice D shifts to historical importance. The logical consequence is that the image cannot communicate the building's full design impact. The answer is C.
